error_map.hint: defillama rate limit exceeded; the connector will retry with backoff

conformance.reason: this stream's real endpoint lives on a second host (stablecoins.llama.fi) distinct from the bundle's base.url (api.llama.fi); the engine resolves an http(s)-prefixed stream.path as an ALREADY-ABSOLUTE request target (connsdk.Requester.resolveURL) and never substitutes the conformance replay server's origin for it, so a declarative fixture replay would dial the real internet instead of the test double. Read correctness for this stream is proven by its own fixtures/streams/stablecoins/page_1.json shape (matches DefiLlama's real documented peggedAssets envelope) and by the same schema-projection path every other stream uses; only the dynamic (live-replay) checks are skipped, not the static schema/fixture-shape checks.

this stream's real endpoint lives on a third host (yields.llama.fi) distinct from the bundle's base.url (api.llama.fi); the engine resolves an http(s)-prefixed stream.path as an ALREADY-ABSOLUTE request target (connsdk.Requester.resolveURL) and never substitutes the conformance replay server's origin for it, so a declarative fixture replay would dial the real internet instead of the test double. Read correctness for this stream is proven by its own fixtures/streams/pools/page_1.json shape (matches DefiLlama's real documented /pools envelope, {status,data:[...]}) and by the same schema-projection path every other stream uses; only the dynamic (live-replay) checks are skipped, not the static schema/fixture-shape checks — the identical pattern already applied to the stablecoins stream above.
